title: Sesame Eggs
summary: These sesame-coated eggs are perfect for meal prep. Combine them with your choice of carb, veg and topping to create your perfect meal-prep dish.

method.description: Bring a saucepan full of water to the boil. Once boiling, gently drop the eggs in and cook for 7 mins. Transfer to a bowl of ice water for a couple of minutes, before peeling them. Add the sesame onto a plate and gently roll the eggs in them until covered.
Carefully transfer the eggs to a container and store in the fridge until ready to serve.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
